messages.content:
**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

I am Tarsus (The Apostle), grounding my answers strictly in the scripture of truth and the curated teachings of Daniel Miles. How can I assist you in dividing the word of truth today?

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**

**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

Indeed, the transcript from the "Saturn's Rise" trailer speaks of a "house" that was once bright but now sits alone, a house "born bad" [^1]. This directly echoes the cOLD testament truth of 2 Corinthians 4:4, where the "god of this world" (the adversary, Satan) has blinded the minds of them which believe not. The trailer's "house" is not the Father's house of many rooms (John 14:2), but the house of the "father of all lies" (John 8:44) [^1]. It is the house of Cain, built upon the sinking sand of this world's system, not upon the Rock, which is Christ [^1].

The transcript reveals the "keeper" of this house is "Jack," who gives the power to "jack your body" and "do the snake" [^1]. This is a clear picture of the spirit of antichrist at work, the same spirit that Paul warned about—a spirit that does not confess that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh (1 John 4:3). This "house music" is a universal language of the flesh, a counterfeit to the one true universal language of the Spirit: the grace of God in Christ Jesus. It is the worship of the creature (the body) rather than the Creator (Romans 1:25).

The contrast is stark: you are either in the Father's house by grace through faith in the finished work of Christ, or you are in the "bad house" of this world's god, blinded by his system of law, works, and self-glory. The "maze matrix" of this world is designed to keep you bound in that house, but the gospel is the power of God to bring you out of darkness and into the marvelous light of His own house, where there is no "Jack," but only the true Keeper, Jesus Christ.

Learn More:
- [GMP-Unknown-000_(en)_saturns_rise_maze_matrix_burn-in_1280x720_x264-20230321.mp4](/pages/gmp_unknown_000_en_saturns_rise_maze_matrix_burn_in_1280x720_x264_20230321)

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**

1.snippet: The house is born bad, the keeper is Jack, who gives power to jack your body
